data.description: `src/components/agent-history-utils.tsx:391` defines its own `buildAgentLabel` — yet another formatter parallel to `formatAgentDisplayLabel`/`parseAgentDisplayParts` in `src/lib/agent-identity.ts`. Per parent foolery-2e97 rule 6, display formatting lives in one function. Either delete `buildAgentLabel` or reduce it to a one-line passthrough.
